summary_one_line: Input must encode a well-formed URL/port plus a literal 'HTTP/2' version token so the parser reads body data and the read-loop re-iterates.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A structured request fixture containing a parseable scheme/host/port ('://' + ':9001/850') and a literal 'HTTP/2' version string in the response region, so curl proceeds through Curl_read, parses headers, and writes body bytes — making data_pending(data) true on at least one loop iteration so the do-while at line 860 takes its TRUE (continue) side.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every winner-resolving seed carries the intact ASCII run '://' followed by '1:9001/850' and a 'HTTP/2' token at offset 0x24 (e.g. 'GHTTP/27.0'); on the W role the loop body runs many times (W hits on data_pending = 1010 vs L = 20) and the blocker takes T=1010/1000 — i.e. the loop continues.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds are short (35-73 bytes) high-entropy '%'-heavy garbage lacking the contiguous '://...:9001/850' URL and a recognizable HTTP version token; on the L role data_pending is essentially never satisfied (blocker line shows L T=0 F=20), so the loop exits on its first/only iteration.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc I2SRandReplace reads intercepted CMP operands (the parser's comparisons against the literal 'HTTP/' scheme and ':' / '/' URL delimiters) from the CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes the expected operand bytes directly into the input at matching offsets, synthesizing the exact magic/delimiter bytes the URL+version parse demands. naive and value_profile lack I2SRandReplace and must hit these multi-byte literals by chance, which they fail to do across all 10 trials.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked branch is the do-while loop continuation at transfer.c:860, true side globally blocked.
Both decisive pairs are I2S-delta pairs (cmplog>naive and vpc>vp).
The second decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog > value_profile with the same I2S delta.
Winner seeds carry an intact '://' URL run with a port and path '1:9001/850'.
Winner seeds contain the '9001/850' port/path run.
Winner seeds embed a literal 'HTTP/2' version token in the response region.
On the winner role the loop body and data_pending run far more often than on the loser role.
The blocker line takes its TRUE (continue) side on the winner role but never on the loser role.
Loser-blocking seeds are short high-entropy '%'-heavy garbage without the structured URL/version run.
cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace mutator that substitutes one intercepted CMP operand for the other at matching input offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: naive has no I2S mutator and must reach literals by chance.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: any of the above. No I2S.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile also lacks I2SRandReplace, so the vpc>vp delta is the same I2S substitution capability.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 442 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 32d10b449c4075ee`; the ancestor chain (25 levels) contains I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depth 23 (id 33f314f66adaa80d) and depth 24 (id 1ce58f232eec81f2), the ParentInfo-only signature of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in cmplog under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness whose URL/version literals are reachable by naive havoc within the same budget (naive resolving at parity with cmplog), or cmplog failing to resolve when the parser's CMP operands against 'HTTP/' and ':' '/' delimiters are removed/obfuscated, would refute the I2S-substitution attribution.

weakest_evidence_point: The chain of inference from the literal URL/'HTTP/2' bytes to data_pending becoming true is source-reasoned, not directly proven; the parser may keep data_pending true via a path other than the version-token comparison.
